keywords: group join idempotency SETNX duplicate join ALREADY_MEMBER ACTIVE PENDING membership userId groupId
ironRules: SETNX on membership:{userId}:{groupId} — duplicate join returns success (not failure)
ALREADY_MEMBER check covers both ACTIVE and PENDING status
group.type read from DB (xiigen-groups) — NOT from request payload
PRIVATE group → PENDING state → emit MembershipPending (NOT MembershipActivated)
